body:
## Wave 2 — Resource Vault (non-runtime)

Adds an auditable, **non-runtime** vault for the uploaded Dealix OS / PR / P0–P50
archives, plus the governance and tooling needed to promote their contents
safely. **No production code is overwritten.**

### What's in this PR
- `resources/company_os/` — the vault
  - `README.md` — what it is / isn't, how to use it
  - `UPLOADED_ARCHIVES_MANIFEST.json` — declared archives, classification, checksum slots
  - `uploaded_archives/.gitkeep` — drop folder for uploaded `*.zip`
- `docs/ops/UPLOADED_RESOURCE_INTEGRATION_DECISION.md` — the governance policy (classification table, promotion order, hard blocks, final gate)
- `scripts/compare_uploaded_resources.sh` — read-only: extract → checksum → summarize → classify each archive (source candidate vs build artifact vs resource)
- `scripts/dealix_integration_wave.sh` — runs the canonical gate bundle for an integration wave
- `.github/workflows/resource-vault-check.yml` — read-only CI guard (`permissions: contents: read`); validates scaffolding, manifest JSON, shell syntax, and that no archive contents leak into runtime paths

### The hard rule
> Uploaded ZIPs are **never** copied over the repo:
> `Extract → Diff → Select → Branch → PR → CI → Merge`

### Note on the archives themselves
The uploaded `.zip` files (`/mnt/data/*`) are **not present in this execution
environment**, so this PR ships the vault *infrastructure* only. Drop the
archives into `resources/company_os/uploaded_archives/`, record their checksums
in the manifest, then run `./scripts/compare_uploaded_resources.sh` to begin the
selective-promotion waves (tests → founder UI → sales/delivery → ops runbooks).

### Validation done
- `bash -n` on both scripts ✅
- manifest parses as valid JSON ✅
- compare script handles the empty-vault case gracefully ✅
- leak-guard logic returns clean on this layout ✅

https://claude.ai/code/session_019mq82vaECL2d3doDJbWa2v

commits.messageBody:
Adds a non-runtime resource vault for uploaded Dealix OS / PR / P0-P50
archives, plus the governance and tooling to promote them safely:

- resources/company_os/ vault (README, archives manifest, drop folder)
- docs/ops/UPLOADED_RESOURCE_INTEGRATION_DECISION.md governance policy
- scripts/compare_uploaded_resources.sh (extract/checksum/classify, read-only)
- scripts/dealix_integration_wave.sh (canonical gate bundle for a wave)
- .github/workflows/resource-vault-check.yml (read-only CI guard)

No production code is overwritten. Uploaded ZIPs are never merged directly:
Extract -> Diff -> Select -> Branch -> PR -> CI -> Merge.
commits.messageHeadline: resources: add Dealix company OS resource vault + integration tooling
